quoteHi: Mehnat itni khamoshi se karo ki safalta shor machaye
quoteEn: Work so silently that success makes the noise
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Sapne woh nahi jo neend mein aaye, sapne woh hain jo neend nahi aane de
quoteEn: Dreams are not what you see in sleep, dreams are what don't let you sleep
author: APJ Abdul Kalam

quoteHi: Haar ke baad hi jeet ka maza aata hai
quoteEn: Victory tastes sweet only after defeat
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Mushkilein woh hoti hain jo humein mazboot banati hain
quoteEn: Difficulties are what make us stronger
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Waqt badalta hai, waqt badal deta hai
quoteEn: Time changes, and time changes everything
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Zindagi mein risk lena zaroori hai, safe khelne se kuch nahi milta
quoteEn: Taking risks in life is necessary, playing safe gives nothing
author: Mark Zuckerberg

quoteHi: Apne aap pe bharosa rakho, duniya tumhare saath hogi
quoteEn: Believe in yourself, the world will stand with you
author: Swami Vivekananda

quoteHi: Safalta ka koi shortcut nahi hota
quoteEn: There is no shortcut to success
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Koshish karne walon ki haar nahi hoti
quoteEn: Those who keep trying never lose
author: Harivansh Rai Bachchan

quoteHi: Agar kisi cheez ko dil se chaho toh poori kaaynat tumhe usse milaane ki koshish mein lag jaati hai
quoteEn: If you want something with all your heart, the entire universe conspires to help you achieve it
author: Paulo Coelho

quoteHi: Kal pe mat chodo, aaj hi karo
quoteEn: Don't leave it for tomorrow, do it today
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Gyaan sabse bada dhan hai
quoteEn: Knowledge is the greatest wealth
author: Chanakya

quoteHi: Har mushkil ka hal hota hai, bas dhundhne ki zaroorat hai
quoteEn: Every problem has a solution, you just need to find it
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Kuch paane ke liye kuch khona padta hai
quoteEn: To gain something, you have to lose something
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Jab tak todenge nahi, tab tak chodenge nahi
quoteEn: Until we break through, we won't give up
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Technology duniya badal rahi hai, seekhte raho
quoteEn: Technology is changing the world, keep learning
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Code likho, bugs fix karo, repeat karo — yahi programmer ki zindagi hai
quoteEn: Write code, fix bugs, repeat — that's a programmer's life
author: Unknown

quoteHi: AI future hai, aur future ab hai
quoteEn: AI is the future, and the future is now
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Patience sabse bada hathiyaar hai
quoteEn: Patience is the greatest weapon
author: Chanakya

quoteHi: Sehat hi asli daulat hai
quoteEn: Health is the real wealth
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quoteHi: Har din ek nayi shuruaat hai
quoteEn: Every day is a new beginning
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Choti choti khushiyon mein badi wali khushi hoti hai
quoteEn: Great happiness lies in small joys
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Apni galtiyon se seekho, doosron ki galtiyon se bhi seekho
quoteEn: Learn from your mistakes, and from others' mistakes too
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Focus karo goals pe, problems khud solve ho jayenge
quoteEn: Focus on goals, problems will solve themselves
author: Unknown

quoteHi: Dushmano se nahi, apne aap se lado — sabse badi jeet wahi hai
quoteEn: Don't fight enemies, fight yourself — the greatest victory is over oneself
author: Unknown
